title: Cello Amazing Mum Wax Melt & Oil Burner – Porcelain Home Decor, Safe for Children, for Mum from Daughter Son – Elegant Bedroom & Room Decor, Fragrance Your Room.
features: Stand-out Lithopone Porcelain: When lit, our thin porcelain shows through a beautifully detailed 3D image of your chosen design to light up every room, making it a stylish feature for home decor, bedroom decor, or room decor.

Simple to Use: Place a tealight candle or Cello scent cup inside the melter and light it. After a short time, your wax will begin to melt and fill your room with your favourite fragrances – a perfect addition to home decor or as a thoughtful gift for mum from daughter or from son.

Uses Tealight Candles: Utilises tealight candles to melt your favourite wax fragrances. Explore your dream fragrances from our wax medallion, wax melt range, and essential oils – a versatile piece for bedroom decor and home accessories.

Design: Cello Amazing Mum Wax Burner makes stunning gifts for mum on special occasions: Mother’s Day gifts, mum birthday gifts, gifts for mum from daughter or from son, mum-to-be candle holders, and in memory of mum gifts. A beautiful addition to any room decor.

Box Contains: Our Cello branded box contains your Porcelain Wax Melt Burner in your chosen design. Well-packaged and presented, it’s the perfect box for gifting – ideal as a Mother’s Day gift, new home decor, or a thoughtful gift for women.

Mum Gifts: This Tealight Burner is the perfect gift for mum on her special day. It makes an elegant porcelain mum ornament for new home decor and bedroom decor, whether as a gift from daughter, from son, or for any motherly figure.

Amazing Mum: Help show needed love and appreciation to a motherly figure in your life by gifting them this mum tealight burner on their special day. This burner can be a symbol of family and love while enhancing your home decor.
Mother's Day: Show your appreciation to your Mum with this Mum Wax Burner – the perfect Mother’s Day gift for women, birthdays, or as a sentimental gift for mum from daughter or from son.

Gifts For Mum: Our Cello Amazing Mum Tealight Wax Burner is the perfect porcelain gift for mum on Mother’s Day! Celebrate her with this elegant, gift-boxed mum burner – ideal for home decor, bedroom decor, and room decor.
